title: SABRE PARIS - Icône 2Pc Butter Knife Set - Butter Spreader - Stainless Steel Knife - White
features: 2 PIECE BUTTER KNIFE SET: Includes two 14cm butter knives. With their blunt blades, our butter knives are perfect for spreading soft butter, olive paste, tomato spread or any other spreadable food on delicious toast.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: We have made sure that our knives would be highly durable while feeling special. The handles are made of acrylic, and the blades of the knives are made of premium AISI 420 Steel.

ICÔNE COLLECTION: If you're looking for elegant yet unique tableware, the Icône Collection is made for you. With its clean lines and 21 colors with a retro feel, you will definitely find the right tableware for your home.

DISHWASHER SAFE: Tired of handwashing after dinner? Our butter knives are 100% dishwasher safe (under 45°C/113°F). Allow yourself to cut your meat with premium knives without having to worry about cleaning them separately.

SABRE PARIS: Sabre Paris is a French tableware manufacturer with a unique artisanal expertise. Our pieces are made and designed in France, in our workshop in the Paris area. Sabre's philosophy? To break the monotony of tableware!
description: Product Description 4 Piece Cutlery Set Cheese Knife Cake Server 2Piece Butter Knife 2 Piece Serving Set Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Price £58.00 £ 58 . 00 £25.00 £ 25 . 00 £33.19 £ 33 . 19 — no data — no data Size 24 cm 26 cm 25 cm 14 cm 26 cm Description The Sabre 4-piece sets are comprised of a soup spoon, a dinner fork, a dinner knife and a teaspoon. This 4-piece set offers the perfect combination for your day-to-day meals. Also available as part of a 24-piece household cutlery set. The advantage of this cheese knife is that it can easily be used to serve your guests thanks to the two teeth at the end of its blade. Its unusual shape makes it an elegant and effective knife for perfectly cutting a wide variety of cheeses. Beautifully curved, the Sabre pie server is a must-have for all your pastries and sweet or savoury tarts. With its non-slicing blade, the Sabre butter spreader is used to spread soft butter, tapenades, taramas or any other foodstuffs to be spread on bread or toast. With a large fork for serving meat and a large spoon for side dishes, this set of Sabre cutlery is a must-have for everyday use. It's the perfect addition to your cutlery set. Modern, colourful and fun since 1993 Sabre was born out of a desire to bring a breath of fresh air to tableware. Combining quality craftsmanship with creativity so that everyone can create the table that suits them. An invitation to create your own style. The most beautiful table is the one that looks like you!
